auth.subtitle: Helping a loved one take their medicine.
auth.name: Name
auth.needSetup: Connect the API first — copy .env.example to .env and add your keys.
auth.localOnly: This build uses local role selection. Go back and choose caregiver or care recipient.
auth.error: Could not sign in. Check your email and password.

welcome.subtitle: Helping a loved one take their medicine.
welcome.caregiverSub: Set up medication and prizes, and watch progress.
welcome.patientSub: Take your doses on camera and earn prizes.

patient.recordToEarn: Record it on camera to earn today's reward.
patient.collectionSub: Earn a sticker every time you record a dose.
patient.nothingToClaimSub: Record your doses to start earning. Your prizes will show up here.

capture.allowSub: We record a short clip so your dose can be confirmed and your reward unlocked.
capture.step3: Open your mouth after the swallow
capture.needsReviewSub: This recording was saved for the caregiver to review. It was not counted as a confirmed dose.
capture.unverifiedReason: AI verification is not connected yet, so this recording needs caregiver review.

caregiver.addLovedOneSub: Set up who you're caring for, their medication, and how prizes are earned.
caregiver.dosesRecordedSub: doses recorded so far this month
caregiver.adherenceEmpty: Adherence and the calendar fill in as doses are recorded.
caregiver.clipUnavailableSub: This dose was recorded before local clip replay was connected.
caregiver.reviewEmpty: When the camera isn't sure about a dose, the clip shows up here for you to watch and confirm.
caregiver.remindersSub: A daily reminder at each dose time.
caregiver.recordedThisMonth: Days recorded this month: {{count}} · tap any past day to log it.
caregiver.rtlNote: Switching language changes the app direction on the next launch.

rewards.title: Prizes
rewards.intro: You fund and hand over every prize. The app just tracks what was earned.
rewards.manualDesc: You set the prizes and exactly how each one is earned.
rewards.autoDesc: You set limits, and the app rotates and combines prizes within them.
rewards.noRewards: No prizes yet. Add one your loved one will actually want — money, a treat, an outing, anything.
rewards.whatPlaceholder: What they get — e.g. ice cream, a movie, 20 ₪, a day out
rewards.noOptions: Add a few prizes, each with a limit. The app rotates them within those limits.
rewards.autoRotateNote: The app rotates and combines these within your limits to keep them motivating.
rewards.toGiveSub: Prizes your loved one earns and asks to claim show up here for you to mark as given.

schedule.title: Medication & schedule
schedule.sub: Saved on your device. Change it anytime.
schedule.noDoses: No doses yet. Add each time they take it during the day.
schedule.remindersSub: A reminder at each dose time.

donation.title: Keep Care Companion free
donation.body: The AI that confirms each dose on camera costs real money to run. I cover it on good will for now so it stays free for families like ours. If you can chip in, it helps me keep it running — and if it ever becomes too much, I'll be honest before anything changes.
donation.unavailableBody: Add EXPO_PUBLIC_API_URL to connect the app to the API, then set STRIPE_SECRET_KEY on the API service.
donation.errorBody: Please try again in a moment. If it keeps happening, check that Stripe is configured on the API.

notif.title: Time for your dose 💊
notif.body: Tap to record it on camera and earn your reward.
